economic_notes: Nation operates Petro Gas Bar, Club SAPP, and The Loonie Bin Gaming Lounge. Investment in Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership (GBE). Mahihkan Bus Lines ceased operations subsequent to year end and investment written off. Economic development start-up loans to members totalling $100,468.
notes: Province is Manitoba (MB). Consolidated entity includes 9 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 1 GBE (Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership) on modified equity basis. Large unexpended funding balance of $11.1M primarily from CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative ($2.26M) and Prevention/Least Disruptive ($3.24M). Federal Government - other revenue of $6,872,261 has no prior year comparative (reported as $0 in 2023), suggesting a large new funding stream. Long-term debt has significant current portion of $4.68M due in 2025 including construction loan maturing June 2024. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNIHB + Federal-MKO + Federal-other + Province of Manitoba + CMHC = 22,140,611 + 7,250,704 + 724,496 + 6,872,261 + 1,019,464 + 365,606 = 38,373,142; OSR = 59,131,234 - 38,373,142 = 20,758,092. Net debt position on balance sheet.
